summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Instituto DBT Chile landing page. All 10 backend API tests passed. All frontend flows verified including hero, all sections, contact form submission with success toast, form clearing, error toast on empty submit, WhatsApp buttons, and mobile hamburger menu.

All MongoDB queries exclude _id via projection {_id:0} — correct
email_status graceful degradation works correctly (returns 'pending' when RESEND_API_KEY empty)
